html:
This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.

Exclusive to:

The Hogus Porkusator is a craftable Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC and it is a version of the Prestihatitator. It is found in the Magic Tab, requires 4 Pig Skins, 4 Boards and 4 Azure Feathers to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.

Contents

  • 1 Crafting Recipes
  • 2 Tips
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Crafting Recipes

  • Meat Effigy
  • Shadow Manipulator
  • Pan Flute
  • One-man Band
  • Night Light
  • Life Giving Amulet
  • Chilled Amulet
  • Ice Staff
  • Nightmare Fuel
  • Purple Gem
  • Sleepytime Stories
  • Root Trunk

Tips

  • The Hogus Porkusator can be destroyed when the player has a Shadow Manipulator available for placement to save resources used to build it.

Trivia

  • The name "Hogus Porkusator" is a reference to the phrase "Hocus Pocus".

Gallery

  • Hogus Porkusator animation.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

This article is incomplete because of the evil sabotage by Maxwell....
Please help to improve the article, or discuss the issue with the community on the talk page according to the talk page etiquette or on our Discord.
Hogus Porkusator
"Pigs can do tricks too."
Object Info
Perk
Unlocks additional crafting recipes in the Magic Tab.
Crafting
×4 ×4 ×4
Tab
Tier
Miscellaneous
"hogusporkusator"
Exclusive to:
“More science for my brain!”
–Wilson
“What's a pig going to teach me?”
–Willow
“Hee hee. Funny little piggie.”
–Wolfgang
“More forgotten knowlege.”
–Wendy
“PORCINE AVIATORS DO NOT COMPUTE”
–WX-78
“A flying pig?! Absurd!”
–Wickerbottom
“Well that's neat.”
–Woodie
“Scientifically proving pigs can fly.”
–Maxwell
“A source of arcane knowledge in the form of an amusing air borne pig.”
–Wagstaff
“What wisdöm döth this pig hide?”
–Wigfrid
“Yay! More things to learn!”
–Webber
“Look at that - pigs can fly!”
–Walani
“Could I fry those wings as well?”
–Warly
“Thars a funny little pig.”
–Woodlegs
“IT GIVETH WILBA SMARTS”
–Wilba
“Twirly Tail Tweeter?”
–Wormwood
“It's just teasing me with those wings.”
–Wheeler
The Hogus Porkusator is a craftable Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC and it is a version of the Prestihatitator. It is found in the Magic Tab, requires 4 Pig Skins, 4 Boards and 4 Azure Feathers to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype.
Contents
1 Crafting Recipes
2 Tips

4 Gallery

The name "Hogus Porkusator" is a reference to the phrase "Hocus Pocus".

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hogus Porkusator là một Kiến Trúc khả chế dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC và nó là một phiên bản của Prestihatitator. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Phép Thuật, yêu cầu 4 Da Lợn, 4 Ván Ép và 4 Lông Vũ Azure để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để nguyên mẫu.
title: Hogus Porkusator
